query: SELECT id, hostName, menuDescription FROM host_listings LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT id, hostName, menuDescription FROM host_listings LIMIT 5;

rows.menuDescription: When the North meets the South (南北融合)

Traditional Shanghainese home cooking featuring xiaolongbao (soup dumplings), hongshaorou (red-braised pork), and seasonal vegetables. All ingredients are fresh from local markets, prepared with family recipes passed down through generations.
I prepare authentic Shanghai dishes including braised beef, noodle soups, and seasonal vegetables. Fresh ingredients daily.
Abc and and and and and and and and and
My specialty is creating a warm, authentic "Shanghai home" dining experience, blending nutritious local flavors with comforting international dishes.

messages: Welcome to our table! This menu features Jiā Cháng Cài (Home-style Cooking)—the heart and soul of Chinese dining. Unlike restaurant food, these dishes are designed for comfort and balance. We bring together a mix of Northern heartiness and Southern delicacy, featuring savory stir-fries, tender braises, and classic family favorites.
Meat & Poultry (荤菜)
1. Flash-Fried Lamb with Scallions
葱爆羊肉
Tender slices of lamb wok-seared with aromatic green onions. A classic Northern dish full of flavor.
2. Honey Glazed Cumin Chicken Wings
蜜汁孜然鸡翅
Savory and sweet wings with a fragrant kick of cumin spice.
3. Steamed Chicken Wings with Shiitake Mushrooms
香菇蒸鸡翅
A lighter, healthier option where the savory juices of the mushrooms infuse the tender chicken.
4. Homestyle Stir-fried Beef
小炒牛肉
Slices of beef stir-fried with fresh peppers and spices for a rich, savory taste.
Vegetables & Tofu (素菜与豆腐)
5. Sautéed Green Beans with Minced Pork & Olive Veg
榄菜肉末四季豆
Crunchy green beans stir-fried with savory minced pork and "Olive Vegetable" (a classic savory preserve).
6. Stir-fried Snow Peas with Chinese Sausage
荷兰豆炒香肠
Crisp, sweet snow peas paired with the rich, smoky flavor of cured Chinese sausage.
7. Braised Tofu with Scallions
葱烧豆腐
Silky tofu braised in a savory sauce infused with the aroma of fried scallions.
8. Home-style Braised Tofu Puffs
家常油豆腐
Spongy tofu puffs that absorb all the delicious sauce of the dish.
Staples (主食)
9. Handmade Dumplings
饺子
The ultimate Chinese comfort food. Hand-wrapped and boiled to perfection.
I prepare fresh meals using market ingredients, featuring classics like:
1. Braised Beef Brisket with Daikon Radish (萝卜炖牛腩)
2. Spinach in Supreme Broth with Century Egg (上汤菠菜)
3. Signature Seafood Noodle Soup (海鲜汤面)
4. Foil-Baked Whole Fish with Lemongrass (香茅烤鱼)
5. Creamy Coconut Chicken Curry (椰香咖喱鸡)
6. Oven-Roasted Chicken Feast (烤鸡大餐)
The menu can be updated on the day depending on what’s fresh. Or let me know what you want to try :)

id	hostName	menuDescription
1	Norika and Steven	When the North meets the South (南北融合)

Welcome to our table! This menu features Jiā Cháng Cài (Home-style Cooking)—the heart and soul of Chinese dining. Unlike restaurant food, these dishes are designed for comfort and balance. We bring together a mix of Northern heartiness and Southern delicacy, featuring savory stir-fries, tender braises, and classic family favorites.

---

Meat & Poultry (荤菜)

1. Flash-Fried Lamb with Scallions
   葱爆羊肉
   Tender slices of lamb wok-seared with aromatic green onions. A classic Northern dish full of flavor.

2. Honey Glazed Cumin Chicken Wings
   蜜汁孜然鸡翅
   Savory and sweet wings with a fragrant kick of cumin spice.

3. Steamed Chicken Wings with Shiitake Mushrooms
   香菇蒸鸡翅
   A lighter, healthier option where the savory juices of the mushrooms infuse the tender chicken.

4. Homestyle Stir-fried Beef
   小炒牛肉
   Slices of beef stir-fried with fresh peppers and spices for a rich, savory taste.

---

Vegetables & Tofu (素菜与豆腐)

5. Sautéed Green Beans with Minced Pork & Olive Veg
   榄菜肉末四季豆
   Crunchy green beans stir-fried with savory minced pork and "Olive Vegetable" (a classic savory preserve).

6. Stir-fried Snow Peas with Chinese Sausage
   荷兰豆炒香肠
   Crisp, sweet snow peas paired with the rich, smoky flavor of cured Chinese sausage.

7. Braised Tofu with Scallions
   葱烧豆腐
   Silky tofu braised in a savory sauce infused with the aroma of fried scallions.

8. Home-style Braised Tofu Puffs
   家常油豆腐
   Spongy tofu puffs that absorb all the delicious sauce of the dish.

---

Staples (主食)

9. Handmade Dumplings
   饺子
   The ultimate Chinese comfort food. Hand-wrapped and boiled to perfection.
